sentences.arabic: يُرَكِّزُ الطِّبُّ الْوِقَائِيُّ عَلَى اكْتِشَافِ الْمَشَاكِلِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ فِي مَرَاحِلِهَا الْأُولَى قَبْلَ أَنْ تَتَفَاقَمَ.
sentences.translation: Preventivna medicina se fokusira na otkrivanje zdravstvenih problema u njihovim ranim fazama prije nego što se pogoršaju.
sentences.translationEn: Preventive medicine focuses on discovering health problems in their early stages before they worsen.

sentences.arabic: تُتِيحُ الْفُحُوصَاتُ الطِّبِّيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ لِلْأَطِبَّاءِ مُرَاقَبَةَ الْمُؤَشِّرَاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ مِثْلَ ضَغْطِ الدَّمِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Periodični medicinski pregledi omogućavaju ljekarima da precizno prate vitalne pokazatelje poput krvnog pritiska.
sentences.translationEn: Periodic medical examinations allow doctors to monitor vital indicators such as blood pressure accurately.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّشْخِيصَ الْمُبَكِّرَ يَزِيدُ مِنْ فُرَصِ الشِّفَاءِ التَّامِّ وَيُقَلِّلُ مِنَ الْحَاجَةِ إِلَى تَدَخُّلَاتٍ جِرَاحِيَّةٍ مُعَقَّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Rana dijagnoza povećava šanse za potpuni oporavak i smanjuje potrebu za složenim hirurškim intervencijama.
sentences.translationEn: Early diagnosis increases the chances of full recovery and reduces the need for complex surgical interventions.

sentences.arabic: يُهْمِلُ الْكَثِيرُونَ هَذِهِ الْفُحُوصَاتِ حَتَّى يَشْعُرُوا بِأَلَمٍ حَادٍّ، وَهُوَ تَصَرُّفٌ قَدْ يُؤَدِّي لِمَضَاعَفَاتٍ خَطِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi zanemaruju ove preglede sve dok ne osjete jak bol, što je postupak koji može dovesti do ozbiljnih komplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: Many neglect these check-ups until they feel sharp pain, a behavior that may lead to serious complications.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الِاسْتِثْمَارُ فِي الصِّحَّةِ عَنْ طَرِيقِ الْوِقَايَةِ دَائِمًا أَفْضَلَ وَأَقَلَّ كُلْفَةً مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ الْمُتَأَخِّرِ.
sentences.translation: Investiranje u zdravlje putem prevencije uvijek se smatra boljim i jeftinijim od zakasnjelog liječenja.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in health through prevention is always considered better and less costly than late treatment.
